note: The official Handbook publishes 21 units of Major Required Courses, 33 units of Major Elective Courses, and two required Honours Project courses for 6 units. Students must take at least two elective courses from each of Groups A, B, C and D and complete 33 elective units in total. RELI2037 is listed in Groups A and D, and RELI3235 is listed in Groups B and C; each is stored once with both eligible groups because the official rule says the same elective course may count toward only one group. The official Level 4 prerequisite/co-requisite rules tied to RELI2007, RELI2015 or RELI2036, and RELI2035 are retained. University Language, General Education and Free Electives are excluded. No Year or Term is assigned because the official requirement table does not specify course timing.
